title: Aseprite Fonts
description: Adds a full, functioning font from Aseprite (a pixel-based, paid image editing program) straight into Minecraft!
body:
This program is used by many people who draw, complement and diversify the Minecraft mod-making community, I know many excellent examples made with this program, so in honor of this great program, I decided to expand its beautiful font into Minecraft, since they have similar stylistics!

![Aseprite Fonts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yWhDSidC/images/a576c876a1ec0d0564032cf5f2812ea7853e4654.png)

### At the moment, in addition to the English language, the resource pack has support for the Cyrillic alphabet, namely:
- Russian;
- Pre-Reform Russian;
- Belorussian;
- Ukrainian.

![Availability of Cyrillic alphabet in the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yWhDSidC/images/66b9ce1da0e1cd9b8b24e6d21ff939b8e68630e7.png)

### Adaptations to new languages ​​are gradually possible, you can contact me in the linked discord server!

I also hasten to thank [@maybdev](https://modrinth.com/user/maybdev) who inspired me with the idea of ​​adding my native and other suitable folk languages ​​to his resource pack, since I myself have been using Aseprite for more than a hundred hours, and am used to this font.

_[Resource pack used in the banner](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mineseprite-ui)_
